response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, backend, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no demonstrated C programming for UNIX in recent years, no Linux kernel modification experience, no networking security background (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), and critically no Japanese language proficiency which is a hard requirement. Background is predominantly web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than embedded firmware or LAN-switch development.
strengths: Long and diverse software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Strong testing discipline and craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — hard requirement not met
No Linux kernel modification or embedded firmware/LAN-switch experience
No demonstrated knowledge of MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, or switch chip SDKs

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel / embedded networking security experience
